rationale: In the theory framing, the citing paper uses Jap (2001), together with Jap (1999), to support a core decomposition of interfirm exchange into value-creating and value-claiming phases. That decomposition is then used to motivate the governance logic about safeguarding claims and enabling adaptation, which feeds into the paper's hypotheses and model setup. So the citation is doing conceptual work beyond a passing background mention, even though it appears in a grouped citation.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Jap (2001) as part of the conceptual foundation for its value-claiming/value-creating framing of exchange. This framing underpins its governance-value argument and hypothesis development on contract incompleteness and outcomes.
